settings.tab_1_heading: Ideal for gaming, streaming, and home office.
settings.tab_1_main_content:
The AutoFull G7 Ergonomic Gaming Chair features 3-zone adaptive lumbar support, a 4D dual-axis headrest and 720° rotating armrests.

The dynamic lumbar system provides reliable, real-time waist support during intense gaming. The 4D headrest fits different body types and postures to reduce neck strain during long sessions. Widened 720° rotating armrests offer stable arm support for PC, mobile and console gaming, effectively relieving arm fatigue.
settings.tab_1_tags:
Upgrade to the light-up mecha version for a unique, bold look that shows your personal style.
All-purpose design ideal for gaming, streaming, video calls and home office use.
Join over 3 million AutoFull customers.
Chair Frame Lifetime Warranty
Fast Free Shipping (ex. AK/HI/PR)
settings.tab_2_main_content:
McKenzie 3-zone adaptive lumbar support, 4D dual-axis headrest, 720° rotating armrests, adjustable backrest & seat cushion, 140° zero-gravity recline, integrated footrest, and wired control base for seamless adjustments.


Dynamic lumbar support stabilizes your waist during long gaming sessions. The 4D headrest and 720° armrests adapt to your posture to reduce neck & arm fatigue. 140° recline with a footrest delivers full-body relaxation. All adjustments are easy to control, keeping you comfortable for gaming, streaming, and home office use.
settings.tab_2_list:
McKenzie 3-zone adaptive lumbar support
  4D dual-axis ergonomic headrest
  720° swivel adjustable armrests
  Adjustable backrest & seat cushion
  140° deep recline
  Integrated retractable footrest
  Easy wire-controlled base
Power bank not included

settings.title: Colors
settings.description: Colors: Available in 4 styles. Featured: Laser, Sakura Pink, White, and Panda.

settings.title: RGB Lighting (Optional)
settings.description: RGB lighting back panel allows you to switch between gaming mode and work mode. Define your setup with dynamic RGB lighting. With sound-reactive sync, the lighting pulses to the rhythm of your environment.

settings.title: Lumbar Support Adjustment
settings.description: 30mm front-to-back lumbar support, 20mm height adjustment, and 40° dual-wing wrap. Adaptive lumbar support for precision comfort in any dynamic posture.

settings.title: Headrest Adjustment
settings.description: Whether leaning in for an attack, sitting upright for a snipe, or reclining to watch, the headrest provides constant, seamless neck support.

settings.title: Armrest Adjustment
settings.description: Armrest Adjustment: Supports 70mm height adjustment, 60mm front-to-back adjustment, 360° surface rotation, 360° handle rotation, and a 4-level flip-up adjustment up to 39°. Perfect arm support for PC gaming, mobile gaming, or resting.

settings.title: 90° to 140°
settings.description:
90° to 140°: Auto-balance mechanism ensures smooth motion regardless of body type.
Lean back or sit up effortlessly. Includes 4-level locking for work, media, or napping. Integrated cable-controlled levers allow for height, depth, and recline adjustments without bending over.

settings.title: user friendly
settings.description: Integrated Cable Controls: Easy operation without bending over

settings.title: Immersive Experience
settings.description: Immersive Experience: Fully immerse yourself in a dedicated gaming or professional workspace.

Experience precision control with 8-way smart floating wings—featuring 40° left/right swivel, a 14° adaptive cradle, and micro-adjustments (1mm front/back, 1.6mm up/down). Engineered for dimensional accuracy in every task.

Experience precision control with 8-way smart floating wings—featuring 40° left/right swivel, a 14° adaptive cradle, and micro-adjustments (1mm front/back, 1.6mm up/down). Engineered for dimensional accuracy in every task.

settings.title: FAQs
settings.faq_1_question: Is the Hbada E3 good for back pain?
settings.faq_1_answer: Yes. The Hbada E3 is designed with ergonomic lumbar support to help relieve back pain caused by long periods of sitting. It promotes better posture and reduces pressure on the lower back.

settings.heading: Professional gaming ergonomics
settings.body: Designed with ergonomics at its core, every chair is engineered to keep your body supported during marathon sessions. Expert-Backed Design: Developed with top specialists from ICA (American Institute of Chiropractic) and ISAKOS (International Sports Medicine Association). Certified Comfort: Meets IGR certification and US ergonomic standards for professional gaming and long-term posture support.

settings.quote: As a spine expert, I believe AutoFull Gaming chair's design is truly commendable. This chair effectively relieves lower back pressure, and the neck pillow provides essential support, reducing strain on the spine. It's particularly beneficial for people who sit for extended periods, such as E-sports players, as it helps maintain proper spine health.

settings.title: Jorena
settings.content: Auoto M6 ultra den krassesten Caming Stuhl den ich auf diesem Planeten jemals gesehen habe.ein riesen Paket und ich freue mich das mit euchzu Öffnen der Aufbau war so einfach dass auch Leute verstehen und ganz einfach zusammen schrauben konnten.dieser Stuhl sieht nicht nur gut aus nein der hat auch einfach eine Sitzheizung für den Winter und für den Sommer sogar eine Belüftungsfunktion.

settings.title: Hall Of Tech
settings.content: The autofull g7 ergonomic chair which was tested and approved by an actual chiropractor.So,yeah,my spine's about to live its best life.Just look at it.It has 22 adjustable features like auto lumber support.

Not only does it have the COOLEST features… 👀 I’m looking at you seat ventilation, buts its lumbar support is so highly adjustable that I knew it would be perfect!

settings.content: The AutoFull M6 is like the boss of gaming chairs! Its heating & cooling function, built-in vibration massage, and 6D adjustable armrests create an epic seating experience – great for marathon gaming or getting stuff done.
